# Changelog — `devPTIpack` Refactoring

> Each entry logs a discrete change made during the architecture redesign.
> Format: date, scope, and one-line summary of what changed and why.

---

## 2026-04-29

| Scope | Change                                                                                                                                           |
| ----- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Docs  | Created `.github/docs/arch-00-overview.md` — legacy architecture map                                                                             |
| Docs  | Created `.github/docs/arch-01-cleanup.md` — function-by-function removal plan (6 batches)                                                        |
| Docs  | Created `.github/docs/arch-02-docs.md` — documentation implementation order                                                                      |
| Rules | Created `.claude/rules/roxygen-documentation.md` — roxygen2 templates and required fields                                                        |
| Rules | Created `.claude/CLAUDE.md` — project context and conventions for AI agents                                                                      |
| Docs  | Added "Permanent Functions" audit to `arch-01-cleanup.md` — visibility (39 exported / ~56 internal) and doc quality for all ~95 active functions |
| Docs  | Fixed spelling/formatting in `arch-00-overview.md` workflow steps 1–7                                                                            |

## 2026-05-01

| Scope   | Change                                                                                                                                          |
| ------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Docs    | Rewrote `PLAN.md` as a thin tracker that defers to `.github/docs/` and the GitHub issues; replaced stale pre-redesign content                   |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/skills/tdd-permanent-fn/SKILL.md` — scaffolds Tier-1 testthat files for permanent functions per arch-03 / arch-02.01           |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/skills/cleanup-batch/SKILL.md` — executes one numbered cleanup batch from arch-01 with pre-flight, tests, check, smoke-test    |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/skills/roxygen-document/SKILL.md` — adds/upgrades roxygen2 per the rules file with template selection and example verification |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/skills/issue-progress-comment/SKILL.md` — drafts confirmation-gated progress comments for #8/#10/#11/#12/#13                   |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/agents/r-package-reviewer.md` sub-agent for read-only diff review of NAMESPACE, roxygen, debug artefacts, and R CMD check      |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/hooks/auto-changelog.sh` Stop hook that auto-drafts changelog rows from the uncommitted diff and is idempotent across reruns   |

| Code    | Added `R/run_pti_pipeline.R` exporting `run_pti_pipeline()` — Shiny-free orchestrator for the seven-step calc pipeline (issue #10 deliverable 1) |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/helper-test-data.R` providing bundled data plus deterministic pipeline intermediates for Tier-1 tests                     |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-calc-pipeline.R` — first batch of Tier-1 cases for `get_mt`/`get_adm_levels`/`clean_geoms`/`pivot_pti_dta`/`get_weighted_data`/`get_scores_data` plus end-to-end via `run_pti_pipeline()`, pinning the lexicographic-sort and 1-row-NA quirks per arch-03 |
| Config  | Regenerated `NAMESPACE` to export `run_pti_pipeline`; bumped `RoxygenNote` to 7.3.3 as a side-effect of `roxygen2::roxygenise()`                |
| Tests   | Extended `helper-test-data.R` with `test_expanded` and `test_merged` so downstream Tier-1 tests don't each rebuild the expand/merge pipeline    |
| Tests   | Added Level A.7 + A.8 cases to `test-calc-pipeline.R` covering `expand_adm_levels` and `merge_expandedn_adm_levels`; pins the >1-element-match short-circuit and the missing-`year` error per arch-02.01 |
| Tests   | Extended `helper-test-data.R` with `test_extrap` (multi-scheme expand+merge) and `test_aggregated` so A.10/A.11 don't each rebuild the chain  |
| Tests   | Added Level A.9 cases to `test-calc-pipeline.R` covering `agg_pti_scores` — output shape, scheme row-binding, spatial_name lookup, NA propagation under both `na_rm_pti2 = FALSE/TRUE`, all-NA-row zero-sum behaviour, and NA-Pcod row dropping |
| Tests   | Added Level A.10 cases (`label_generic_pti` + `generic_pti_glue`) covering glue-class output, HTML structure, NA -> "No data" rendering, 5-decimal score formatting, and list-shape preservation |
| Tests   | Added Level A.11 cases (`structure_pti_data`) covering output slots, `pti_codes` mapping, wide pivot to `pti_score..pti_ind_N`, row-count-preserving geometry join, the synthetic "No data" filler for missing (Pcod, scheme) combos, and admin_level extraction from shape list names |
| Tests   | Added Level B integration tests — one per adjacent-stage pair (pivot->weight->score->expand->merge->agg->label->structure) so contracts between stages are pinned in addition to the orchestrator-level checks |
| Tooling | Added "PLAN.md Sync (COMPULSORY)" section to `.claude/CLAUDE.md` — every PR that touches tracked work updates `PLAN.md` in the same commit                                                            |
| Tooling | Added a final "Sync `PLAN.md`" step to the `tdd-permanent-fn`, `cleanup-batch`, and `roxygen-document` skills so tick-off is part of the workflow, not an afterthought                                |

Includes a `capture_validator()` helper that mocks the validators' internal `testthat::test_that` calls so their inner expectation failures don't pollute the outer suite; pins the pre-existing empty-pattern `str_detect` bug in `validate_read_shp` (refactor will land via #7) |

Notes the multi-admin-only constraint pinned in PLAN.md §12 (single-admin indicators trip the expand_adm_levels NULL short-circuit) |

| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked `mod_get_admin_levels_srv` under §4.1 1g (4/7 modules covered), bumped Phase-1 ASCII tree to "in progress (4/7)", logged PR #36; suite total updated to 634 PASS |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-mod-var-selector.R` (1g fifth module) — Tier-2 `shiny::testServer` coverage for `mod_fltr_sel_var2_srv` per arch-03 §2.5: initial `updatePickerInput` populates display-name choices (intercepted via `testthat::local_mocked_bindings(.package = "shinyWidgets")`), setting `input$indicators` runs the 500ms-debounced filter through `filter_var_explorer()`, switching the selection swaps which admin slots survive, `first_open(TRUE)` auto-selects the first display name, `add_selected()` override fires `updatePickerInput` (single-var-per-pillar happy path). Bug pin (§12): the `add_selected` observer's `purrr::map_lgl(., ~ .x %in% c(...))` predicate errors with "Result must be length 1, not N" when any pillar holds >1 variable; pinned via the underlying predicate expression rather than via `expect_error` around `testServer` (Shiny captures observeEvent errors through its stack-trace machinery and neither `expect_error` nor `expect_warning` reliably catches them). 7 `test_that` blocks / 18 expectations |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked `mod_fltr_sel_var2_srv` under §4.1 1g (5/7 modules covered), bumped Phase-1 ASCII tree to "in progress (5/7)", swapped the leftover `TBD` for PR #36, logged PR #37, suite total updated to 652 PASS, added §12 row pinning the `purrr::map_lgl` length-1 violation |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-mod-wt-save.R` (1g sixth module) — Tier-2 `shiny::testServer` coverage for `mod_wt_save_newsrv` per arch-03 §2.6: save-new with empty storage, overwrite by same name, save-new alongside an existing scheme; button-UI label and disabled state for "Save and plot new PTI" (new name + non-zero weights), "Provide a name" (empty name), "Modify weights" (all-zero weights), "No changes to save" (matching name + identical weights), "Save changes and plot PTI" (matching name + changed weights). UI assertions read the internal `current_btn_ui()` reactiveVal directly from `expr` scope (renderUI side effect). 8 `test_that` blocks / 17 expectations. arch-03 §2.6's "Delete scheme" case actually targets `mod_wt_delete_newsrv` (separate permanent function, not on the 1g checklist) — out of scope here |

| Tooling | Added `.github/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml` CI gate (Phase 2.5 prelude). Single Ubuntu / R-release cell using `r-lib/actions/check-r-package@v2` with `args: c("--no-manual", "--as-cran")`, `error-on: '"error"'`, `NOT_CRAN=true`. Triggered on push + pull_request to `main` / `koichi-arch-redesign`, mirroring `tests.yaml`. R CMD check has never run on CI before; this surfaces Rd / NAMESPACE / examples warnings that accumulated across the ~95 functions documented in Phase 3 (PRs #47-#53) and that local check (~1h per `project_rcmdcheck` memory) was skipping. Initial threshold is `error-on: '"error"'` to land the gate without blocking on the unknown residual list; threshold-tightening to `'"warning"'` happens in a follow-up commit on this branch after the first CI run is triaged |

## 2026-05-05

| Scope  | Change |
| ------ | ------ |
| Config | Removed `*.Rd` from `.gitignore`. **Root cause of the 38-name "Undocumented code objects" WARNING surfaced by the new R-CMD-check workflow.** Phase 3 batches all ran `roxygen2::roxygenise()` locally and produced `man/*.Rd` files, but `*.Rd` was git-ignored at line 13 so none of them ever reached the repo. CI checked out source with no `man/*.Rd` and flagged every exported symbol as undocumented. Single-line fix; un-tracking the ignore unblocks committing the Rd files |
| Docs   | Committed all 36 `man/*.Rd` files (35 from Phase 3 + 1 new `devPTIpack-package.Rd` from the package-level docs file added this PR). Generated by `roxygen2::roxygenise(load_code = "pkgload")` on `koichi-arch-redesign` HEAD; matches current `R/` source. Closes the "Undocumented code objects" WARNING entirely |
| Code   | New `R/devPTIpack-package.R` with `"_PACKAGE"` doc and package-level `@importFrom` declarations for the base-R / shiny symbols R CMD check flagged as undefined globals: `grDevices::dev.off`/`pdf`/`png`; `stats::line`/`quantile`/`setNames`/`var`; `utils::data`/`str`; `shiny::outputOptions`/`hr`. Plus a `utils::globalVariables(c(...))` block listing the 30 NSE column-name bindings used inside dplyr / tidyselect / glue verbs throughout the package (`.`, `var_code`, `var_name`, `pillar_*`, `pti_*`, `fltr_*`, etc.). Closes the "no visible binding for global variable" NOTE without scattering `.data$` pinning across ~40 call sites |
| Code   | Fixed real typo `Sys.date()` -> `Sys.Date()` in `R/mod_dwnld_dta.R:85` (data-export filename builder). `Sys.date` doesn't exist; the download handler would error at runtime when a user clicked the export button. Surfaced as an "undefined global" entry in the R CMD check NOTE — fixed in-place rather than masked via `globalVariables()`. Tier-3 manual verification recommended before Phase 2 closes (no Tier-1 test exists for the download handler filename path) |
| Config | Bumped `Depends: R (>= 3.6.0)` -> `R (>= 4.1.0)` in DESCRIPTION. Closes the build-time WARNING `"Added dependency on R >= 4.1.0"` triggered by `\(...)` lambda shorthand in `R/run_pti_pipeline.R` (added in PR #46). Per-arch reality: the package already required 4.1+ as of PR #46; the DESCRIPTION just hadn't caught up |
| Config | Added `withr (>= 2.5)` to `Suggests` in DESCRIPTION. Used by 5 test fixtures (`withr::local_tempfile` / `withr::local_tempdir` in `tests/testthat/test-validators.R` and `tests/testthat/test-template-reader.R`). Closes the WARNING `"'::' or ':::' import not declared from: 'withr'"` |
| Config | Added `^README\.Rmd$` and `^inst/sample_pti/.*/\.keep$` to `.Rbuildignore`. Closes the NOTE on top-level non-standard files (`README.Rmd`) and the NOTE on hidden files (`inst/sample_pti/R/.keep`, `inst/sample_pti/app-data/.keep`) |
| Config | `roxygen2::roxygenise(load_code = "pkgload")` regenerated `NAMESPACE`. Net effect (commit 2 + commit 3 combined): added 8 new `importFrom` directives (3x `grDevices`, 2x `stats`, 1x `utils`, 2x `shiny`); added 1 new `man/devPTIpack-package.Rd`; refreshed all 35 existing `man/*.Rd` files (no content changes since Phase 3 #53 -- they had simply never been committed) |
| Tests  | `pkgload::load_all() + testthat::test_local()` ran clean: `[ FAIL 0 \| WARN 204 \| SKIP 1 \| PASS 682 ]` (summary-reporter `PASS` count, per `project_test_count` memory). Net delta from previous run: zero. Code changes are metadata-only or in a path (`mod_dwnld_dta.R::Sys.Date`) that has no Tier-1 coverage |
| Tooling | Documented two known residuals in PR #54 that were intentionally left unfixed in this PR: (1) **WARNING** `Non-standard license specification: 'tbd.'` -- the package License field is a real legal call for the maintainers, not CI cleanup. Blocks tightening `error-on` to `'"warning"'` until set; the gate stays at `error-on: '"error"'`. (2) **NOTE** `Namespaces in Imports field not imported from: 'bsplus' 'config' 'here' 'pkgload' 'rmarkdown' 'tippy'` -- auditing whether each is silently load-bearing (golem startup, app-build helpers, vignette deps) is out of scope for a CI-gate PR. Doesn't block any threshold |
| Code   | r-package-reviewer follow-up trim of `R/devPTIpack-package.R`: dropped 3 dead `@importFrom` declarations (`stats::line`, `stats::var`, `utils::data`) that were imported on the prior commit but have no call sites anywhere in `R/`. They were originally added because R CMD check listed them under "Undefined global functions or variables", but those entries were column-name NSE bindings (`var_name`, `var_code`) that are correctly handled by the `globalVariables()` block, not actual function calls. Kept `shiny::hr` (genuine call site at `R/mod_pti_map_side_pan.R:52`) which the reviewer initially flagged as also dead. NAMESPACE net effect: -3 `importFrom` directives. Doesn't change R CMD check status |
| Docs   | Added 2 rows to PLAN.md §12 "Discovered bugs (pinned in tests)" -- new entries that surfaced during PR #54 (Phase 2.5 R-CMD-check / manual-smoke gate): (1) `R/supporting-goe-prep.R::gg_admin_list` defaults `mt = zam_bounds_simple` to a name that doesn't exist anywhere in `R/` or `data/`; calling without explicit `mt` errors at runtime. Found by r-package-reviewer audit of the `globalVariables()` list. Currently silenced via `globalVariables("zam_bounds_simple")` so R CMD check stays clean -- the silencer is a holding pattern, not a fix. (2) `R/mod_dwnld_dta.R::mod_dwnld_file_server` filename builder `basename(filepath)` produces broken downloads (`pagepti-mtdt.html`, `pagepti-shp.html`, etc. across PTI / PTI-compare / Data-explorer tabs) when `filepath` is `NULL` or `"."`; `launch_pti()`'s defaults `mtdtpdf_path = "."` and `shapes_path = "."` trigger this every time the metadata or shapes download button is clicked. Found manually clicking those buttons in `launch_pti(shp_dta = ukr_shp, inp_dta = ukr_mtdt_full)`. Sister handler `mod_dwnld_local_file_server` in `R/mod_dwnld_local_file.R` already has the right shape (`metadata-{.pti_name}-{Sys.Date()}.{.ext}` glue template) but isn't wired in. Both rows have no test pin yet -- pinning is a sub-task of the eventual fix PR. Updated §12 preamble to clarify that Phase-2.5-discovered entries (rows 12+) don't follow the "pinned during Tier-1 test writing" convention |
| Code   | Reverted 3 of the importFrom trims from earlier today (`stats::line`, `stats::var`, `utils::data`) -- but **not** to importFroms. Third CI run on `ci/r-cmd-check` showed those three names re-flagged under "no visible binding for global variable" at three new call sites I'd missed: `R/dta_cleaners.R::get_indicators_list` uses `data` as a column reference inside `mutate(years = map(data, ~ ...))` after `tidyr::nest()`; `R/supporting-goe-prep.R::gg_admin_list` uses `var` as a column created by `pivot_longer(names_to = "var", ...)`; `R/mod_plot_poly_leaf.R::make_gg_line_map` uses `line` as a column created by `mutate(line = ..2)`. All three are NSE column-name bindings, not function calls -- so the right silencer is `globalVariables()` (where they were not), not `@importFrom`. Moved `"data"`, `"line"`, `"var"` into the existing `globalVariables()` block in `R/devPTIpack-package.R`. NAMESPACE unchanged (globalVariables doesn't write NAMESPACE). The reviewer was right that the imports were dead; wrong that the names weren't referenced anywhere. Net effect: third CI run's status `1 WARNING, 2 NOTEs` -> expected `1 WARNING, 1 NOTE` on next run |
